mapper.sql: select id, user_id, tg_user_id, super_user_id, channel_id, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, order_no, order_type, exchange_type, account_type, type, amount, old_amount, new_amount, remark, operator, create_time, sign, sign_time from t_amount_change
select a.*, u.user_tg_username as username from t_amount_change a left join t_user u on u.user_id = a.user_id
mapper.select: select * from t_amount_change where sign is null order by id asc limit #{start}, #{limit}

select IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 3 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rechargeAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS customerRechargeAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS withdrawAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS downAmount from t_amount_change where user_id =#{userId} and create_time >= #{startTime} and create_time <= #{endTime}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM t_amount_change WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(id), 0) AS max_id FROM t_amount_change;
